title: Permission to Move — Daniel Fox
meta_description: On the sales floor, music gives a person permission to buy. In a public park, it gives permission to move and to connect. Dizzy Charlie's is the same idea at the scale of a whole community.

schema.headline: Permission to Move
schema.description: Daniel Fox turned a jazz booking agency into public-space activation, designing a summer concert series so overlapping music pulled overlapping people who mixed and came back.
